A '''clone scout trooper''' was a member of the [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite Corps]] and assisted [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], alongside [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] [[Gree (clone trooper)/Legends|Gree]], during the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]]. When [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] reached [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], Gree [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] the [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] to help him [[Great Jedi Purge|execute]] the [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]]. Yoda, sensing the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of many other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], spun around and swiftly beheaded both the [[Clone scout trooper/Legends|clone scout trooper]] and Gree, before they could fire a shot.<ref name="ROTS" />
